channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: US hockey star Charlie McAvoy receives praise for big hit on Canada's Connor McDavid in intense 4 Nations game
item.description: U.S. hockey players praised Charlie McAvoy for setting the tone in their win over Canada with hit on Connor McDavid. The U.S. won the electric game, 3-1.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ryan Preece thought of daughter as car flew through air in scary wreck at Daytona 500
item.description: Ryan Preece was airborne with five laps to go in the Daytona 500 on Sunday night, and he admitted thinking about his daughter as he was hoping to walk out of the wreck.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame are No. 1 seeded teams in first NCAA Tournament reveal
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame would be the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA Tournament if it began now. The NCAA basketball selection committee on Sunday did its first reveal of the teams in line for the top 16 seeds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The All-Star verdicts are in, and the player reaction to the mini-tournament is mixed
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The verdicts were mixed, as would be expected. The NBA's All-Star Game mini-tournament is now complete, Shaq's OGs getting the win in the four-team, three-game event where the first squad to score 40 points in each game got the victory. Some players liked it. Some didn't.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shaq's OGs win the 1st NBA All-Star mini-tournament, topping Chuck's Global Stars 41-25 in the final
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The winning total last year: 211 points. The winning total this year: 41 points. An All-Star Game like none other — since it was three games, not one — still had plenty of flash and not a lot of fire.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Owner/driver Jimmie Johnson notches his best Daytona 500 finish since winning the race in 2013
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Jimmie Johnson was simultaneously relieved and overwhelmed as he climbed out of his No. 84 Toyota at Daytona International Speedway on Sunday night. It was a different set of emotions for the seven-time NASCAR champion and the two-time Daytona 500 winner.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hamlin expected a late caution would give him a 4th Daytona 500 win. NASCAR never threw the yellow
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Denny Hamlin surged into the lead on the final lap of the Daytona 500 and thought he had a fourth victory in “The Great American Race” within his reach Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Owner/driver Jimmie Johnson notches his best Daytona 500 finish since winning the race in 2013
item.description: Jimmie Johnson nearly got Shaquille O’Neal to victory lane at Daytona International Speedway — at least virtually.
item.dc:creator: Mark Long, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Padres baseball season in San Diego kicks off March 27 with opening series, East Village Block Party
item.description: The Padres are gearing up for the start of baseball season in San Diego and fans can get excited with the free East Village Block Party that takes place during opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: BYU rolls past Kansas State, 80-65
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored 17 points and grabbed 14 rebounds on Saturday night to help BYU beat Kansas State 80-65 and snap the Wildcats' six-game win streak. Dallin Hall scored 16 points and Fousseyni Traore 11 for BYU (17-8, 8-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Padres release 2025 spring broadcast schedule
item.description: The San Diego Padres unveiled their 2025 spring broadcast schedule Thursday, stirring excitement for the approaching season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz fall to Clippers in final game before All-Star break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Norman Powell scored a season-high 41 points and James Harden added 32 to lift the Los Angeles Clippers to a 120-116 overtime victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night. Harden also had 10 rebounds, seven assists and three steals.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rain doesn't disappoint golf fans at Genesis Invitational
item.description: Rainy weather isn’t stopping golf fans from enjoying the biggest tournament in San Diego this week, as the Genesis Invitational takes over Torrey Pines Golf Course.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: How two women's love for the Cubs led to a life-saving kidney transplant
item.description: Cathy Weadley and Denise Vasquez met at a Cubs spring training event in 2022, where Weadley was inspired to donate her kidney to Vasquez, who was in need of a transplant.
item.dc:creator: Jewell Hillery, WGN 9

item.title: Muni will be free for NBA-All Star, Lunar New Year weekend, SFMTA announces
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- With thousands of people expected to descend on San Francisco this weekend for the NBA All-Stars and Lunar New Year Parade, officials are urging people to leave their cars at home.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Measure for county to back ban on trans women in sports fails
item.description: An effort to get San Diego County to throw its support behind a bill in Congress that would ban transgender girls and women from competing in women's sports failed when it was brought forward at the Board of Supervisors on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 48, The Bishop's School 37
item.description: A big time coastal league matchup between SFC and Bishop's in boys basketball. The last time these 2 teams faced off the SFC Eagles won by just 2 points.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Holmoe will be a part of search for his replacement
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After 20 years on the job, Tom Holmoe decided this past summer that this would be his last year as BYU's athletic director. "I made the decision in July of this year," Holmoe said at his retirement press conference Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Egor Demin leads BYU past West Virginia, 73-69
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - Freshman Egor Demin scored 16 points to lead BYU to a 73-69 win over West Virginia on Tuesday night. Kanon Catchings added 11 points for BYU (16-8, 7-6 Big 12). "Gutsy win by our guys," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield freed from prison after rape conviction overturned
item.description: (AP) -- A judge has granted the release of former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield after his 2020 rape conviction was vacated by a California appeals court last December.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles family featured in Super Bowl commercial
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Taco Bell marked its return to the Super Bowl with a commercial that featured nearly 400 fans, including a couple from Los Angeles and their newborn baby.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl losers get this ring instead
item.description: What about the losers? They also get a ring – though not one to commemorate their presence at the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation
